violations.description: Time as a public health control. — --Food was not served or discarded within four hours from the time when the food was removed from temperature control. -Hot hold items displayed fro customer grab n go marked for 6 hour hold time (8a-2p) with items found at 9:45am with temperatures of 118-125F.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Small pizza cooking trays have carbon build up on surfaces.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dust debris at top of dishwasher, white shelf, backside of condiment containers and black oscillating fan.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Cases of unopened ice bags stored below chemicals in dry storage area.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Food trays stored on white shelf are not stored inverted.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet cloths left at sink near soda dispensers. -Sani bucket at prep table found at less than 150ppm Quat. COS-300ppm Quat.

Contaminated food disposition. — ---Pasties did not have time stamp on packages. -Sides had incorrect time of 2pm on log. *Corrected while on-site to 12pm. -Hot hold logs were not filled out upon arrival, staff new fill times of each product so were able to correct while on-site.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — ---Bottle of dish soap and closed bottle of Off stored on top of ice machine.--Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Limescale/residue at upper interior surfaces of ice machine (around ice drop).--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Residue/crumbs at dishwasher top. -Grease/limescale residue at edges of doors and at interior back upper surface of dishwasher. -Frost build up at top shelf and around fans of walk in freezer.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dust at back side of Frazil machines.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Debris at floor edges and under shelves in dry storage room, walk in cooler, and walk in freezer.
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)

Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
